_comment: This file shows the expected shape of content data. Replace with real client data or connect to a CMS. Each top-level key maps to a page section.

hero.headline: Your Compelling Headline Here
hero.subheadline: A concise supporting statement that reinforces the headline and drives the visitor to action.

services.title: Service One
services.description: Brief description of this service and the value it delivers to the client.

services.title: Service Two
services.description: Brief description of this service and the value it delivers to the client.

services.title: Service Three
services.description: Brief description of this service and the value it delivers to the client.

about.headline: About [Business Name]
about.body: A paragraph or two describing the business, its mission, and why clients choose them. Keep it concise and customer-focused.

testimonials.author: Client Name
testimonials.body: Testimonial text that highlights a specific, believable outcome or experience with the business.

faq.question: What is your typical turnaround time?
faq.answer: Answer the question clearly and concisely.

faq.question: Do you offer a free consultation?
faq.answer: Answer the question clearly and concisely.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: We'd love to hear from you. Fill out the form and we'll be in touch shortly.
contact.successMessage: Thank you! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
